overview: A hackathon club website with member registration, event calendar, and a neon cyberpunk arcade hub with a fully playable space shooter game featuring achievements, skins, and leaderboards.
features: Member registration form with admin dashboard and approve/delete controls
Public event calendar with clickable event popups and glassy aesthetic
NEXUS ARENA games hub with separate player login/signup
Space Shooter game with waves, bosses, weapon upgrades, power-ups, and combos
12-achievement system with mid-game popup notifications and 2 legendary super-rare badges
6 unlockable spaceship skins including 2 legendary designs
Synthesized sound effects and EDM background music with mute toggle
Global leaderboard with Grand Arena Ranking across all games
Admin tabs for player ID management and leaderboard moderation
Dark/light mode toggle via header brand text
